# Sandip B. Tawhare

> Portfolio of Sandip B. Tawhare — Senior Laravel Developer, System Architect, and DevOps engineer with 7+ years of experience building scalable backend systems, REST APIs, and cloud-native solutions.

Sandip is a Pune-based engineer specializing in Laravel, PHP, AWS, Docker, Kubernetes, and CI/CD pipelines. This site showcases his experience, skills, featured projects, and open-source Laravel packages.

## Pages

- [Home](https://www.sandiptawhare.com/): About, skills, experience, projects, open source, and contact
- [Resume (PDF)](https://resume.sandiptawhare.com/Sandip%20Baliram%20Tawhare%20-%20Resume.pdf): Full resume

## Open source packages

- [react-qr-code](https://www.sandiptawhare.com/repo/react-qr-code)
- [cheque-printing-software](https://www.sandiptawhare.com/repo/cheque-printing-software)
- [laravel-api-toolkit](https://www.sandiptawhare.com/repo/laravel-api-toolkit)
- [laravel-dynamic-settings](https://www.sandiptawhare.com/repo/laravel-dynamic-settings)
- [laravel-audit-pro](https://www.sandiptawhare.com/repo/laravel-audit-pro)
- [laravel-multi-payment-gateway](https://www.sandiptawhare.com/repo/laravel-multi-payment-gateway)
- [Laravel-QR-Auth](https://www.sandiptawhare.com/repo/Laravel-QR-Auth)
- [telescope-exporter](https://www.sandiptawhare.com/repo/telescope-exporter)
- [role-permission-visualizer](https://www.sandiptawhare.com/repo/role-permission-visualizer)
